bbd96f52-e75d-4f0a-bdd1-c139811726f2.content:
Ava — Operational Log

2026-02-26 — First Activation

Board state: 31 features, all backlog. 0 in progress. 0 agents. Auto-mode off.

Critical blocker: No dev/staging branches exist. prBaseBranch=dev but branch missing. helix-branch-strategy is critical path.

Actions taken:

  • Cleaned 4 duplicate feature pairs from board
  • Set dependency chains for proper execution order
  • Created dev + staging branches from main

Status — 2026-02-27

HELIX-PROTO-PLAN.md Synthesis Complete.

  • Read and analyzed 7,879-line expansion architecture document (298KB, 33 sections, 4 authors)
  • Created Automaker project: helix-design-system-expansion-roadmap with 5 milestones
  • Generated 44 board features across 5 phase epics (39 features + 5 epics)
  • Set up dependency chains: Phase 1 critical path (token migration → Grade A → npm publish), cross-phase epic deps (P1→P2→P3→P4→P5), Phase 2 v1.0.0 blocked by all 12 new components
  • Prioritized Phase 1 start points: Token migration (P1/foundation), JSDoc (P1), Vitest tests (P1)
  • Marked helix-branch-strategy as done (dev/staging already created)
  • Board total: 71 features (70 backlog, 1 done)

Phase 1 unblocked features ready for auto-mode: Token migration, JSDoc annotations, Vitest tests, Changesets setup

Status — 2026-02-28

Board cleanup + auto-mode live.

  • Fixed 3 stuck features (turbo-cache → done, Agent SDK → backlog, Extension API → backlog)
  • PR #8 (axe-core) — rebased, conflict resolved, all Vercel green, merged to dev
  • Auto-mode started at 2x concurrency — 38 backlog features queued
  • Created manual-steps-required.md context file — agents will create Linear issues for any 3rd-party config requiring manual action
